MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Mosser Companies is present. Represented by Melissa Ferris.
Attorney, Marina Franco, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Veronica Pillatzke, is present.
Attorney, Alice Tan, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Amanda Ebey, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-07-2010 is vacated.
